title: Principal Plant Manager at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India Advisory Limited:
Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India Advisory Limited!
